notes: Emergency hotfix for 1.3.63. /v1/responses endpoint hit AttributeError on every call (ResponsesRequest.response_format does not exist — Responses API uses text.format). Every chat using the panel's /v1/responses path returned 500 Internal Server Error. Fix: getattr fallback + text.format.type unwrap. 3 regression guards added. 420 pass, 7 skip, 4 pre-existing env fails. Recommend immediate upgrade from 1.3.63.
